creator: gl@inter-data.dk
text:
Having same problem here with 6.2-RELEASE-p4 stock SMP-kernel on a SuperMic=
ro SuperServer 50145M-MT+ with IPMI module.
Connected at a gigabit switch with Category 6 cable. Tried another cable an=
d a 100Mbit/s switch with same result.
Now trying out sysctl dev.em.0.tx_int_delay=3D0
Please let me know if I can provide further info.
---------------
